records.question: What Italian TV channels that are not high definition focus on music content?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
WHERE tv_channel.language = 'Italian' AND tv_channel.hight_definition_tv = 'no' AND tv_channel.content = 'music'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT "id"
FROM "TV_Channel"
WHERE "Country" = 'Italy'
AND "Hight_definition_TV" = 'No'
AND "Content" = 'Music'

records.question: Which TV channels have aired the episode titled Blowback?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN tv_series ON tv_channel.id = tv_series.channel
WHERE tv_series.episode = 'Blowback'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT TV_Channel.id
FROM TV_Channel
JOIN TV_series ON TV_Channel.id = TV_series.Channel
WHERE TV_series.Episode = 'Blowback'
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT TV_Channel.id
FROM TV_Channel
JOIN Cartoon ON TV_Channel.id = Cartoon.Channel
WHERE Cartoon.Title = 'Blowback'

records.question: Which TV channels that are not high definition have series where the rating is exactly 4.4?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN tv_series ON tv_channel.id = tv_series.channel
WHERE tv_series.rating = '4.4' AND tv_channel.hight_definition_tv = 'no'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT tv_channel.id
FROM TV_Channel tv_channel
JOIN TV_series ON tv_channel.id = TV_series.Channel
WHERE tv_channel.Hight_definition_TV != 'Yes'
AND TV_series.Rating = '4.4'

records.question: Which TV channels that are not pay-per-view, not high definition, and have a 4:3 aspect ratio belong to the Hip Hop TV series, are in Italian, focus on music, and have the package option Sky Famiglia?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
WHERE tv_channel.pay_per_view_ppv = 'no' AND tv_channel.package_option = 'Sky Famiglia' AND tv_channel.pixel_aspect_ratio_par = '4:3' AND tv_channel.series_name = 'Hip Hop TV' AND tv_channel.hight_definition_tv = 'no' AND tv_channel.language = 'Italian' AND tv_channel.content = 'music'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT tv_channel.id
FROM TV_Channel tv_channel
WHERE tv_channel.Pay_per_view_PPV = 'No'
  AND tv_channel.Hight_definition_TV = 'No'
  AND tv_channel.Pixel_aspect_ratio_PAR = '4:3'
  AND tv_channel.Language = 'Italian'
  AND tv_channel.Content = 'Music'
  AND tv_channel.Package_Option = 'Sky Famiglia'
  AND tv_channel.series_name = 'Hip Hop TV'

records.question: Which TV channels that are not pay-per-view and have the Sky Famiglia package air the episode Keepers of a series with a share of exactly 6.0 and also show cartoons directed by Ben Jones with a production code of at most 101.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN tv_series ON tv_channel.id = tv_series.channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE tv_series.share = 6.0 AND tv_channel.package_option = 'Sky Famiglia' AND cartoon.directed_by = 'Ben Jones' AND tv_series.episode = 'Keepers' AND tv_channel.pay_per_view_ppv = 'no' AND cartoon.production_code <= 101.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT tc.id
FROM TV_Channel tc
WHERE tc.Pay_per_view_PPV = 'No'
  AND tc.Package_Option = 'Sky Famiglia'
  AND tc.id IN (
    SELECT ts.Channel
    FROM TV_series ts
    WHERE ts.Episode = 'Keepers of'
      AND ts.Share = 6.0
  )
  AND tc.id IN (
    SELECT c.Channel
    FROM Cartoon c
    WHERE c.Directed_by = 'Ben Jones'
      AND c.Production_code <= 101.0
  )

records.question: Which TV channels that have a pixel aspect ratio of 4:3 and belong to the Sky Famiglia package, with music content, also air cartoons titled The Rise of the Blue Beetle! written by Michael Jelenic and TV series with a weekly rank of 71.0, share of 6.0, and rating of 3.7?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN tv_series ON tv_channel.id = tv_series.channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE tv_series.weekly_rank = 71.0 AND tv_series.share = 6.0 AND cartoon.written_by = 'Michael Jelenic' AND tv_series.rating = '3.7' AND tv_channel.pixel_aspect_ratio_par = '4:3' AND tv_channel.package_option = 'Sky Famiglia' AND tv_channel.content = 'music' AND cartoon.title = 'The Rise of the Blue Beetle!'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT tc.id
FROM TV_Channel tc
WHERE tc.Pixel_aspect_ratio_PAR = '4:3'
AND tc.Package_Option = 'Sky Famiglia'
AND tc.Content = 'music'
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM Cartoon c
  WHERE c.Channel = tc.id
  AND c.Title = 'The Rise of the Blue Beetle!'
  AND c.Written_by = 'Michael Jelenic'
)
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM TV_series ts
  WHERE ts.Channel = tc.id
  AND ts.Weekly_Rank = 71.0
  AND ts.Share = 6.0
  AND ts.Rating = '3.7'
)

records.question: Which English-language music channels in the United Kingdom that are not pay-per-view have series rated 4.0 with a share of at most 7.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN tv_series ON tv_channel.id = tv_series.channel
WHERE tv_channel.language = 'English' AND tv_series.share <= 7.0 AND tv_channel.pay_per_view_ppv = 'no' AND tv_channel.country = 'United Kingdom' AND tv_channel.content = 'music' AND tv_series.rating = '4.0'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT tc."id"
FROM "TV_Channel" tc
JOIN "TV_series" ts ON tc."id" = ts."Channel"
WHERE tc."Language" = 'English'
AND tc."Country" = 'United Kingdom'
AND tc."Content" = 'music'
AND tc."Pay_per_view_PPV" = 'no'
AND ts."Rating" = '4.0'
AND ts."Share" <= 7.0

JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE tv_channel.pay_per_view_ppv = 'no' AND tv_series.viewers_m = '5.13' AND tv_series.share = 6.0 AND tv_channel.package_option = 'no ( FTV )' AND cartoon.production_code >= 108.0 AND tv_series.weekly_rank >= 80.0 AND tv_channel.content = 'music'
